mapper.select: SELECT id, player_id, sign_in_days, last_sign_in_date, create_time, update_time FROM daily_login_record WHERE player_id = #{playerId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_login_record (player_id, sign_in_days, last_sign_in_date) VALUES (#{playerId}, #{signInDays}, #{lastSignInDate})
